# Task Brief Week 5 - Core Team

**Module target:** Evidence Kit (`src/modules/evidence/`) — link manager UI, auto-generated evidence appendix table, and QR codes per link. Opens Phase 2.
**Git branch:** `feature/W5-evidence-kit`

> **Cross-cutting constraints.** All types conform to `Design/Modules/Other/CanonicalTypes.md` (single source of truth — never re-declare a shape). Pin runtime deps to **exact** versions (no `^`/`~`, per `Design/Modules/Other/TechnicalStack.md`). `tsconfig` `strict: true`, no `any` (use `unknown` + `zod.parse()` at I/O). Route `/` stays the workspace editor. ≤200 lines/file (`VibeCode.md` §3); inter-module imports only via each module's `index.ts` public surface; CSS uses only `var(--rs-*)` tokens.
>
> **W5 install matrix.** Adds **only** `qrcode` (deferred in `TechnicalStack.md` §8, unlocked exactly at W5). The evidence appendix reuses the W2 `unified` pipeline; export reuses the W4 export libs. **NOT this week / FORBIDDEN:** any network/fetch lib (offline hard rule), cloud storage SDK (no-cloud Non-goal), `pptxgenjs` (→Phase 3).
>
> **🔒 Offline (hard rule — `VibeCode.md §4`, `ProductPRD.md §6`).** Evidence validation checks **URL shape only** (zod), never fetches a live link. QR codes are generated **locally** by `qrcode` (no network, no remote QR service).
>
> **🔒 No cloud.** Evidence stores **links + local asset references only** — no file upload, no cloud bucket, no email.

> **⚠️ Reconciliation — most of the "Day 1" + "Day 5" work already exists.**
> - `src/types/evidence.ts` (`EvidenceKind` 9 values + `EvidenceItem`), the zod schemas (`evidenceKindSchema`, `evidenceItemSchema`), and `ReportProjectBundle.evidence: EvidenceItem[]` were all shipped in **W1**. W5 **reuses verbatim** — the roadmap's Day-1 `[NEW] src/types/evidence.ts` is a **no-op verification**, not a re-creation.
> - The checker rules `missing-required-evidence`, `broken-evidence-url-shape`, `missing-project-links` already read **real** `bundle.evidence` (built in **W3** + W3-break). W5 Day-5 "checker hook" is therefore **verify + extend tests**, not a rewrite.
> - Autosave already persists the **whole bundle** (`useDraftAutosave → saveBundle(bundle)`), so `evidence` rides along automatically — **no autosave change needed**. The gap is wiring evidence *mutations* into `bundle.evidence` state.
>
> **⚠️ Reconciliation — preview path.** Roadmap says `src/modules/write/PreviewPanel.tsx`; the preview actually lives at `src/components/PreviewPane.tsx` (W2/W3 accepted deviation). W5 keeps the real location.
>
> **⚠️ Cross-week dependency — export embedding.** W4 export (`export-html/pdf/docx`) is **not implemented yet** (still typed-error stubs on the W4 branch). W5 ships the appendix builder + QR as **pipeline artifacts** consumed by preview **now**; embedding QR/appendix into the export *files* lands **with/after W4** (Group D scopes this explicitly — do it on the W4 export once it exists, not against the stubs).

## Day 1: Evidence Foundation & Validation

- `[C56]` Verify canonical evidence types/schemas (already in `src/types`) — **no re-declaration**. Add `src/modules/evidence/kind-meta.ts` — a `Record<EvidenceKind, { label: string; icon: string }>` for the 9 kinds (UI labels + a11y, Vietnamese labels).
- `[C57]` Add `src/modules/evidence/validate.ts` — `validateEvidence(input): { ok: true; item: EvidenceItem } | { ok: false; errors }` via the existing `evidenceItemSchema` + **URL-shape-only** check (`new URL()`/zod, **no fetch**). Empty/optional `url` allowed.

## Day 2: Evidence Link Manager UI

- `[C58]` Add `src/modules/evidence/EvidenceForm.tsx` — pick `kind` (9 options from `kind-meta`), enter `title`/`url`/`note`, `qrEnabled` toggle; validate via `validateEvidence`; surface errors inline (a11y: labels, keyboard).
- `[C59]` Add `src/modules/evidence/EvidencePanel.tsx` — list + add/edit/remove `EvidenceItem`; mutate `bundle.evidence` (id via `crypto.randomUUID()`, `createdAt` ISO). Wire into `Workspace.tsx`; persistence is automatic via the existing whole-bundle autosave (verify, don't modify autosave).

## Day 3: Evidence Appendix Table

- `[C60]` Add `src/modules/evidence/evidence-appendix.ts` — `buildEvidenceAppendix(evidence: EvidenceItem[]): string` → a deterministic Markdown table (kind label · title · url · note), heading "Phụ lục minh chứng". Empty evidence → `""` (no empty appendix).
- `[C61]` Add `src/modules/evidence/index.ts` (public surface: `EvidencePanel`, `validateEvidence`, `buildEvidenceAppendix`, `kindMeta`). Inject the appendix into the preview (`src/components/PreviewPane.tsx`) through the **same** `unified` pipeline (no second renderer).

## Day 4: QR Code Generation

- `[C62]` `npm i -E qrcode` (+ `@types/qrcode` dev). Add `src/modules/evidence/evidence-qr.ts` — `toQrDataUrl(url: string): Promise<string>` (local generation; offline). QR generated **on-demand**, never stored in the draft (only `qrEnabled` persists).
- `[C63]` Add `src/modules/evidence/EvidenceQrPreview.tsx`; render QR next to each `qrEnabled` link in the appendix preview. **Export embedding (W4-dependent):** when W4 export exists, embed appendix + QR into `export-html/pdf/docx` via the shared appendix artifact; if W4 stubs are still in place, scope this to the builder + preview and note export-embed as a follow-up on the W4 branch.

## Day 5: Checker Reconciliation & QA

- `[C64]` Verify `src/modules/check/rules/evidence-gaps.ts` against real Evidence-Kit data (already reads `bundle.evidence` since W3); extend `evidence-gaps.test.ts` to cover the new UI-produced items (required-kind missing, bad URL shape, present-link no-false-positive). No rule rewrite.
- `[C65]` Run lint/typecheck/test/build; write `Design/Reports/Month2/W5/W5_QA_Report.md` + `evidence_samples.md` + `build_output.txt`.

## W5 Locked Decisions (review-agreed)

1. **Evidence types are canonical and already shipped — reuse, never re-declare.** `EvidenceKind`/`EvidenceItem` (CanonicalTypes §2) + schemas exist from W1. W5 consumes them; changing a shape means editing `CanonicalTypes.md` first.

2. **Offline absolutely.** `validateEvidence` checks URL *shape* only (zod/`new URL()`), never fetches. `qrcode` runs locally — no remote QR service, no network anywhere in the module.

3. **The appendix is one AST/Markdown artifact through the one pipeline.** `buildEvidenceAppendix` emits Markdown parsed by the shared `unified` pipeline, so preview = the 3 export formats (numbering/structure parity, `TechnicalStack.md §3`). No second renderer.

4. **QR is on-demand, never persisted in the draft.** Only `qrEnabled: boolean` lives in `EvidenceItem`. QR data URLs are generated at preview/export time and discarded — keeps IndexedDB drafts small (`week5.md` Risk: QR bloat).

5. **Evidence is a supporting module with a single public surface.** Everything in `src/modules/evidence/`; Write/Check/Export import only `@/modules/evidence` (`index.ts`). Evidence persists via the existing whole-bundle autosave — **no autosave change**.

6. **Checker already reads real evidence — W5 verifies, not rewrites.** `missing-required-evidence`/`broken-evidence-url-shape`/`missing-project-links` (W3) already consume `bundle.evidence`. W5 only extends test coverage for the UI-produced data.

7. **Export-file embedding follows W4.** The appendix builder + QR are independent, pipeline-level artifacts shipped now (preview-integrated). Embedding into `export-html/pdf/docx` happens on the real W4 export — not against the current typed-error stubs.

## Risks

| Risk | Level | Mitigation |
|---|---:|---|
| URL validation fetches the network (breaks offline) | High | Shape-only via zod/`new URL()`; no `fetch`; test asserts no network (`VibeCode.md §4`). |
| QR data URLs bloat IndexedDB drafts | Medium | Generate on-demand at preview/export; persist only `qrEnabled` (Locked #4). |
| Appendix renders inconsistently across the 3 formats | Medium | Appendix is Markdown→AST through the one pipeline (Locked #3); export consumes the same artifact. |
| Export embedding blocked on unfinished W4 | Medium | Decouple — ship builder + QR + preview now; embed into export when W4 lands (Locked #7). |
| Evidence scope creeps into cloud storage | Medium | Links + local refs only; no upload (no-cloud Non-goal). |
| Re-declaring canonical evidence types | Low | Reuse `src/types/evidence.ts`; Day-1 "new types" is a no-op verification (reconciliation). |
| Any file exceeds 200 lines | Low | Split form / panel / appendix / qr / kind-meta into small files (`VibeCode.md §3`). |
